Course

Experiential Learning (optional) (Overlap permitted with other requirements/courses)

Requirements: 0 credits

Course

Students must earn a minimum of 120 credits to complete a degree. Requirements for Graduation ____ 50% of BMGT credits completed at UMCP. ____ 45 credits of BMGT coursework completed. ____ 60 credits earned at a 4-year school. ____ 58 upper level credits completed. ____ Last 30 credits completed at UMCP.
